## How tested

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make vet` clean
- [ ] Added/updated a regression test for the bug or feature
- [ ] Live-tested locally against a real (or stubbed) Schema Registry

## Checklist

- [ ] Single conceptual change (no drive-by refactors)
- [ ] No secrets, customer names, or internal IDs in the diff
- [ ] Updated docs (README / DEPLOYMENT / RUNBOOK / CHANGELOG) if relevant
- [ ] Backwards-compatible — or breaking change is called out explicitly below
